prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A three-stage vertical flow diagram showing the Escalation Pathway when a shoe size is out of stock. STAGE 1 (TOP): An isometric TV screen (Orange #F59400 frame) displays three shoe card icons in a row. The leftmost shoe card has a prominent 'X' mark and a 'SOLD OUT UK 5' label in Pink #FC6978. The other two shoe cards are normal (Blue and Orange colored). STAGE 2 (MIDDLE): A matte black silhouette hand holds an isometric smartphone. The phone screen shows a warning icon (⚠️) in Orange and a speech bubble: 'Similar alternative found — 91% match' in Blue #6C82FE. A thin Pink #FC6978 flowing arc connects Stage 1 to Stage 2. STAGE 3 (BOTTOM): The same TV screen, now updated. The sold-out shoe card on the left has become semi-transparent/ghosted. An arrow (Pink) points from it to a NEW shoe card that has appeared beside it — the Adidas alternative, highlighted with a subtle glow. The other two cards remain unchanged. The entire three-stage flow is connected by flowing Pink #FC6978 directional arcs from top to middle to bottom. All forms: clean uniform-weight matte black #111111 outlines. Soft-cell shading. Light Gray #EEEEEE background. Generous negative space between stages. Element White on device faces for luminosity.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D photorealism, realistic shoes, actual product photos, brand logos
